title: Engineering track in elevate says currently not broadcasting - others experience it too?
excerpt:
Hey, 
The api session didn’t broadcast and now the current as well. 
Is it happening to others? 
Thanks, 
Ronen

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff / @lalondesteve,

We had some technical difficulties during the API session - sorry about that!

We’re going to be doing this session again next week (for the EU conference) and will then be sharing the recording afterwards - stay tuned!

-Daniel
